vocab.meaning: đạt tới tiêu chuẩn, xứng đáng với (kỳ vọng)
vocab.example: None of my subsequent tutors could quite measure up to the high standards set by my primary school teacher.

vocab.meaning: khơi mào, truyền cảm hứng cho (một sự quan tâm hoặc đam mê)
vocab.example: It was her enthusiastic lectures that sparked off my lifelong fascination with ancient civilizations.

vocab.meaning: chọn ra, chú ý đặc biệt đến (ai đó trong một nhóm)
vocab.example: She had a knack for singling out students who were struggling and providing them with tailored support.

vocab.meaning: làm cho sôi động, bớt nhàm chán
vocab.example: He used to liven up his literature classes by having us act out scenes from the plays we were reading.

vocab.meaning: lan truyền, ảnh hưởng (phẩm chất/thái độ) sang người khác
vocab.example: I’d like to think that his unwavering optimism and work ethic eventually rubbed off on me.

vocab.meaning: hướng tới, thiết kế phù hợp cho (một đối tượng cụ thể)
vocab.example: Her teaching style was perfectly geared toward visual learners, which helped me grasp difficult concepts instantly.

vocab.meaning: can thiệp, góp lời (trong một cuộc thảo luận sôi nổi)
vocab.example: He always encouraged us to chime in with our own opinions during his seminars, making us feel heard.

vocab.meaning: xem lướt qua, kiểm tra nhanh (nhưng vẫn nắm được ý chính)
vocab.example: She could just glance over a piece of writing and immediately identify exactly where the argument needed strengthening.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng, thúc đẩy (một phẩm chất/tư duy) bên trong ai đó
vocab.example: My math teacher helped foster in me a sense of confidence that I had previously lacked.

vocab.meaning: thuyết phục, chiếm được cảm tình của ai đó
vocab.example: Although he was strict, his genuine passion for the subject quickly won over even the most rebellious students.
